SiteContent.title: SiteContent
SiteContent.description: The root document containing all site content, visitor count, categories, and settings

visitorCount.description: Number of total visitors to the site

settings.description: General branding settings, links, and passwords

categories.description: List of all download categories (rooms) and their respective package items

/site/content.description: The single document storing all Pars Mazi site configuration and packs
